description: Style Note scullers is celebration of life at its fullest, most unusual and least expected. Scullers is for those who take on life with self-assurance and soul. A blue and white striped T-shirt with the logo on the chest is the epitome of style brought to you by the brand!Product Description Blue and white striped T-shirt with a spread collar, has a two button placket, short ribbed sleeves with vents at hem Material and Care 100% cottonDo not bleach or wringTumble dry or low dry in shadeLow iron inside outSize Relaxed FitThe model (height 6' and shoulders 18”) is wearing a size M
